name: medical-guidelines-suite
description: Medical Clinical Guidelines Knowledge Base Suite: Build, Query, and Batch Process. Builds structured knowledge bases from PDF/DOCX guidelines, provides intelligent cross-guideline retrieval, and generates batch patient recommendation reports (Excel + Word + PowerPoint).
author: fshaan

files.description: Main skill definition (build + query + batch) with clawdis frontmatter
Version history following Keep a Changelog format
Portable update check and maintenance workflow
PDF processing guide for retrieval phase
PDF extraction methods for build phase
DOCX processing guide for retrieval phase
DOCX extraction methods for build phase
Batch input Excel format specification (structured + narrative)
Template for root knowledge base index
PowerPoint template with branded layouts for batch report slides
PDF text extraction script using pdftotext
DOCX text extraction script using python-docx
Batch extraction entry point for all guideline files
Batch patient pipeline: parse, split, merge, validate, generate (5 subcommands)
Example clinical questions demonstrating skill usage
